title: Validating JSON Data with XPath Expressions
scenario: Create a JSON artifact representing a JSON data object with a complex structure. The output should be a valid XPath expression used for validating the JSON data. The expression should correctly select all elements and attributes as per the JSON data structure.
constraints: Must be a valid XPath expression
Must correctly select all elements and attributes in the JSON data
Must adhere to the XPath syntax and semantics

evaluationCriteria.description: Checks if the generated XPath expression is valid.
Verifies if the generated XPath expression correctly selects all elements and attributes in the JSON data.
Evaluates if the generated XPath expression adheres to the XPath syntax and semantics.
